request.details: Caller requests to reschedule appointment to June 24th at 3 PM.

requests.details: Caller requests to reschedule appointment to June 24th at 3 PM.

transcript: Hi, my name is Linda Chen, date of birth November 5, 1990. I have Kaiser Permanente. I would like to reschedule my appointment to June 24th at 3 PM if possible. My number is 628-555-0193.
